<!-- Copilot instructions for this repository -->
# Copilot Code Generation Instructions

Project: LearnJava

- Preferred language: Java
- Source path: `src/main/java`
- Compiled output: `bin`

Guidelines for generated code:

- Match existing project style and package structure.
- Keep changes minimal and focused; do not reorganize the repository.
- For new classes, place them under the appropriate `com.corejava` package.
- Avoid adding external dependencies unless requested.
- Provide brief unit-test or example usage when adding runnable code.
- For any code change you make always add a comment 'Generated by Copilot - start' at the start of the code block generated by you and 'Generated by Copilot - end' at the end of the code block generated by you.

- For any change you make always fetch the current timestamp and add as a comment at the end of code block which is generated by you.

- For any change you make, summarize in the changelog.md file. Add the filename you changed along with the number of lines generated by you in that file. Include changes only in .java file and add the total number of lines generated by you.

Build / run hints:

- Compile with: `javac -d bin $(find src/main/java -name "*.java")`
- Run a class: `java -cp bin com.corejava.SomeClass`

If unsure about behavior or formatting, ask before making large changes.

Maintainers: follow project conventions in the `src/main/java` tree.
